scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:desktop
scripts.test:rust: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo check --workspace --locked && cargo test --workspace --locked
scripts.test:draft-fixtures: cargo test -p draft_model schema_fixtures -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_model draft_fixtures -- --nocapture
scripts.test:project-store: cargo test -p project_store create_project_bundle -- --nocapture && cargo test -p project_store round_trip -- --nocapture && cargo test -p project_store save_project_bundle -- --nocapture && cargo test -p project_store path_resolution -- --nocapture
scripts.test:material-probe: cargo test -p media_runtime material_probe -- --nocapture && cargo test -p testkit material -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase2-source-guards: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; ! rg -n "\b(Asset|Clip)\b" crates/draft_model/src crates/bindings_node/src schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated; ! rg -n "durationSeconds|duration_seconds|seconds: f32|seconds: f64|\bf32\b|\bf64\b" crates/draft_model/src schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated; ! rg -n "ffmpeg|ffprobe" apps/desktop-electron/src; ! rg -n "probe_material_metadata|FfmpegExecutor|ffprobe|ffmpeg|add_material|upsert_material|mark_material_(available|missing|probe_failed)" crates/project_store/src; ! rg -n "\b(thumbnails|waveforms|previewCaches|renderGraph|ffmpegScripts|rawProbeJson|exports|proxyFiles|thumbnailPath|waveformPath|previewCachePath)\b" schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated/Draft.ts fixtures/draft/positive'
scripts.test:phase3-commands: cargo test -p draft_commands timeline_edits -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands invalid_edits_are_atomic -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands snapping -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands undo_redo -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands text_commands -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands audio_commands -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase3-source-guards: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; ! rg -n "media_runtime|media_runtime_desktop|project_store|preview_service|render_graph|ffmpeg_compiler|bindings_node|ffmpeg|ffprobe|electron|napi|node|std::fs|fs::|std::process" crates/draft_commands/src crates/draft_commands/Cargo.toml; ! rg -n "sourceTimerange|targetTimerange|mainTrackMagnet|segmentId|trackId|\.tracks[[:space:]]*(=|\[)|tracks\.(push|splice|sort)|\.segments[[:space:]]*(=|\[)|segments\.(push|splice|sort)" apps/desktop-electron/src/renderer apps/desktop-electron/src/main apps/desktop-electron/src/preload; ! rg -n "durationSeconds|duration_seconds|source.*Seconds|target.*Seconds|seconds: f32|seconds: f64|\bf32\b|\bf64\b" crates/draft_model/src crates/draft_commands/src schemas/command.schema.json schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated; ! rg -n "\b(Asset|Clip)\b" crates/draft_model/src crates/draft_commands/src schemas/command.schema.json schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated; ! rg -n "commandState|undoStack|redoStack|maxHistoryEntries|snapping" fixtures/draft/positive fixtures/draft/negative; git diff --exit-code schemas apps/desktop-electron/src/generated'
scripts.test:phase4-professional-ui: pnpm run test:phase4-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase4-workspace
scripts.test:phase5-render-core: cargo test -p engine_core -- --nocapture && cargo test -p render_graph -- --nocapture && cargo test -p ffmpeg_compiler -- --nocapture && cargo test -p preview_service -- --nocapture && cargo test -p media_runtime export_job -- --nocapture && cargo test -p media_runtime output_validation -- --nocapture && cargo test -p testkit preview_export_parity -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase6-runtime: cargo test -p media_runtime runtime_capability -- --nocapture && cargo test -p bindings_node runtime_capabilities -- --nocapture && pnpm --filter @video-editor/desktop test:runtime-diagnostics && pnpm --filter @video-editor/desktop test:real-workflow
scripts.test:phase6: pnpm run test:phase6-runtime && pnpm run test:phase6-release-gates
scripts.test:phase7-rust: cargo test -p draft_model canvas -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands canvas -- --nocapture && cargo test -p bindings_node canvas_commands -- --nocapture && cargo test -p engine_core canvas -- --nocapture && cargo test -p render_graph canvas -- --nocapture && cargo test -p ffmpeg_compiler canvas -- --nocapture && cargo test -p preview_service canvas -- --nocapture && cargo test -p bindings_node export_commands -- --nocapture && cargo test -p testkit preview_export_parity -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase7: pnpm run test:phase7-rust && pnpm run test:phase7-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase7-workspace && pnpm run test:contracts
scripts.test:phase8-rust: cargo test -p draft_model visual -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands visual_transform -- --nocapture && cargo test -p bindings_node transform_commands -- --nocapture && cargo test -p engine_core transform -- --nocapture && cargo test -p render_graph transform -- --nocapture && cargo test -p ffmpeg_compiler transform -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase8-workspace: pnpm --filter @video-editor/desktop test:workspace -g "画面变换|command-only transform|五大区域"
scripts.test:phase8: pnpm run test:phase8-rust && pnpm run test:phase8-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase8-workspace && pnpm run test:contracts
scripts.test:phase9-rust: cargo test -p draft_model text -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands text -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_commands subtitle -- --nocapture && cargo test -p bindings_node text_commands -- --nocapture && cargo test -p engine_core text -- --nocapture && cargo test -p render_graph text -- --nocapture && cargo test -p ffmpeg_compiler text -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase9-workspace: pnpm --filter @video-editor/desktop test:workspace -g "文字|字幕|command-only text|五大区域"
scripts.test:phase9: pnpm run test:phase9-rust && pnpm run test:phase9-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase9-workspace && pnpm run test:contracts
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:schema && pnpm run test:draft-fixtures && pnpm run test:project-store && pnpm run test:runtime && pnpm run test:material-probe && pnpm run test:material-service && pnpm run test:bindings && pnpm run test:desktop && pnpm run test:render-smoke && pnpm run test:phase2-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase3-commands && pnpm run test:phase3-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase4-professional-ui && pnpm run test:phase5-render-core && pnpm run test:phase5-source-guards && pnpm run test:phase5-workspace && pnpm run test:phase6 && pnpm run test:phase7 && pnpm run test:phase8 && pnpm run test:phase9 && pnpm run test:contracts
